references.hebrew: כִּי־אֵשׁ֙ יָֽצְאָ֣ה מֵֽחֶשְׁבּ֔וֹן לֶהָבָ֖ה מִקִּרְיַ֣ת סִיחֹ֑ן אָֽכְלָה֙ עָ֣ר מוֹאָ֔ב בַּעֲלֵ֖י בָּמ֥וֹת אַרְנֹֽן׃
references.english:
For fire went forth from Heshbon,
Flame from Sihon’s city,
Consuming Ar of Moab,
The lords of BamothnBamoth Cf. vv. 19 and 20, and 22.21. by the Arnon.

references.hebrew: וַנִּירָ֛ם אָבַ֥ד חֶשְׁבּ֖וֹן עַד־דִּיבֹ֑ן וַנַּשִּׁ֣ים עַד־נֹ֔פַח אֲשֶׁ֖רׄ עַד־מֵֽידְבָֽא׃
references.english:
oMeaning of verse uncertain. Alternatively: “Their dominion is at an end / From Heshbon to Dibon / And from Nashim to Nophah, / Which is hard by Medeba.” Yet we have cast them down utterly,
Heshbon along with Dibon;
We have wrought desolation at Nophah,
Which is hard by Medeba.

commentary_links.hebrew: עַל־כֵּ֛ן יֹאמְר֥וּ הַמֹּשְׁלִ֖ים בֹּ֣אוּ חֶשְׁבּ֑וֹן תִּבָּנֶ֥ה וְתִכּוֹנֵ֖ן עִ֥יר סִיחֽוֹן׃
commentary_links.english:
Therefore the bards would recite:
mThe meaning of several parts of this ancient poem is no longer certain. “Come to Heshbon; firmly built
And well founded is Sihon’s city.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אם אתה עושה כן תבנה בעולם הזה ותכונן לעולם הבא עיר סיחון אם

For fire went forth from Heshbon,
Flame from Sihon’s city,
Consuming Ar of Moab,
The lords of BamothnBamoth Cf. vv. 19 and 20, and 22.21. by the Arnon.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מקרית סיחן מקרית צדיקים שנקראו שיחין אכלה ער מואב זה המהלך אחר
